epigraph.quote: Richard told a story about Hattie climbing a 7ft wall on her army course, helping a girl, so they didn't have to run the course again.

moments.quote: went to Brook House Farm for Simon to check on hop-picking machines.

moments.place: Legges of Bromyard, Bromyard, Herefordshire, UK
moments.quote: we went to Legges [as] we'd failed to take stuff out of fridge at home
We are camped at Wyside Club Site, right next to river. Lots of rain in night.
